raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding a fraudulent credit card transaction that I reported to Citi in XX/XX/year> and and that remains open despite multiple calls and follow ups. 

The transaction was unauthorized, and I was not in the United States at the time it occurred, making it impossible for me to have initiated or approved it. Since XX/XX/year>, there have been no new transactions on the account. All amounts added to subsequent billing statements consist solely of interest and late fees resulting from the banks failure to conclude the fraud investigation. 

Despite timely reporting and repeated follow-ups, Citi has failed to : XXXX. ) Conclude the fraud investigation XXXX. ) Remove the fraudulent charge XXXX. ) Reverse fees and interest caused by the delay
